calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two minors.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
On Nov. 20, 2003 The Court waived the appearance of the Petitioner
There being no appearance by the Petitioner and Proof of Service of notice has been filed with the court.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S
from Syuzan Igorevna Volynskaya to Susan Volinski.
from Viktor Daniel Igorevich Volynskiy to Daniel Volinski.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Reset To Jan-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Janet Pond.
Petitioner, Victoria Volinski present for minors in pro per, was sworn and examined.
This matter is continued to Jan. 13, 2004 at 09:00 am.
Petitioner to serve notice of the petition on Minors' father and file proof of service with the court. No appearance by the petitioner is required.
